question: Who originally defined HTML in 1990?

choices: Strict error reporting that stops rendering
Breaking backwards compatibility for new features

question: HTML is considered which type of data structure?

Which HTML tag is used to create a multi-line block for grouping content?

choices: To provide the image source URL
To provide text if the image cannot be displayed or for screen readers
To add a border to the image

question: Why is it recommended NOT to use borderless tables for page layout?
choices: It is too fast for browsers to render
It violates semantic intent and confuses screen readers
HTML5 does not support the 'border' attribute

question: Which attribute is used in an anchor tag <a> to specify the link's destination?

What does CSS stand for?
What is a primary advantage of using CSS for web development?
choices: It makes the website run only on desktop PCs
It allows for the separation of content and presentation
It increases the size of every downloaded page
It forces developers to specify alignment for every individual element

question: Which CSS implementation level applies to a single tag only?
Which CSS selector matches all elements on a page?
In the CSS Box Model, what is the space between the border and the content called?
Which CSS 'position' value removes an element entirely from the normal flow and offsets it relative to its most recently positioned ancestor?
How can a developer override standard CSS priority/precedence rules?
choices: By moving the rule to the User Agent stylesheet
By using an element selector instead of an ID
By placing the rule first in the document

question: How many columns does the Bootstrap grid system use for layout?

choices: A library of 200 icons rendered as text
